title: History Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with History or Social Studies Composite endorsement.  Additional endorsements strongly encouraged.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
